creator: snvoronkov@yandex.ru
text:
Due to broken Xorg port (for about a month now) I'm moving my desktop
to linux. As far as I know there is no plans to support Xorg on RELENG_6
anymore - it requires last DRM code, which isn't present in 6.4+.

So I can't maintain desktop ports anymore (Can't test them).

I'v just grabed most of them from the pool, please excuse me for THAT noise.
I'm realy sorry... I havn't read properly freebsd-x11 maillist until I'v
started to try to get last ports collection.

Fix: 

audio/id3v2
audio/pysol-sound-server
databases/p5-Mysql
emulators/mtools
games/pysol
games/pysol-cardsets
games/pysol-music
graphics/flphoto
sysutils/dvdbackup
sysutils/mbmon 	  	  	 
sysutils/xmbmon
www/p5-Apache-Radius
